steps.title: Spot the historical constraint signaled by the passage
steps.content: The phrase “only ______ red and green lights until the three-light signal was developed in the 1920s” signals that early signals had a limited, specific composition.

steps.title: Find the word matching the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is that early signals contained only red and green lights.

Featured means “displayed” or “included,” so “Traffic lights only featured red and green lights until the three-light signal was developed” correctly expresses this.

The other choices either reverse the meaning (avoided, disregarded) or lack contextual sense (appreciated).

That matches Choice B — featured.
